task: Get the frozen vegetarian cheese pizza between 5 to 10 USD on Target.
final_result_response:
Here are the frozen vegetarian cheese pizzas between $5–$10 USD found on Target (https://www.target.com/s?searchTerm=frozen+vegetarian+cheese+pizza):

1. **Banza Chickpea Gluten Free Protein Cheese Frozen Pizza** (10.9oz) — $7.99 ($0.73/oz) | ⭐ 4.7 (502 reviews) | Buy 2 for $12 deal | SNAP EBT eligible

2. **Good & Gather™ Gluten Free Cauliflower Crust Four Cheese Frozen Pizza** — $6.79 ($0.55/oz) | ⭐ 4.3 (220 reviews) | SNAP EBT eligible

3. **Good & Gather™ Gluten Free Traditional Crust Frozen Cheese Pizza** (21.1oz) — $9.49 ($0.45/oz) | ⭐ 4.1 (202 reviews) | SNAP EBT eligible

4. **California Pizza Kitchen Thin Crust Frozen Four Cheese Pizza** (13.5oz) — $7.69 ($0.57/oz) | ⭐ 4.4 (1,100 reviews) | Buy 2 for $12 deal | SNAP EBT eligible

5. **California Pizza Kitchen Thin Crust 12" Frozen Margherita Pizza** (15.5oz) — $7.69 ($0.50/oz) | ⭐ 4.4 (1,529 reviews) | Buy 2 for $12 deal | SNAP EBT eligible

6. **Good & Gather™ Signature Wood-Fired Spinach & Goat Cheese Frozen Pizza** (17.5oz) — $6.99 ($0.40/oz) | ⭐ 4.2 (1,053 reviews) | SNAP EBT eligible

All products are vegetarian cheese pizzas priced between $5 and $10, available on Target.com.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user wants to find frozen vegetarian cheese pizzas on Target.com that are priced between $5 and $10 USD. A successful completion would list the relevant products with their names, prices, and other useful details within that price range.

**Output Assessment:** The agent returned 6 frozen vegetarian cheese pizzas from Target.com, all priced between $5–$10 USD: Banza Chickpea Cheese Pizza ($7.99), Good & Gather Cauliflower Crust Four Cheese ($6.79), Good & Gather Traditional Crust Cheese Pizza ($9.49), CPK Thin Crust Four Cheese ($7.69), CPK Thin Crust Margherita ($7.69), and Good & Gather Spinach & Goat Cheese ($6.99). Each listing included price per oz, star rating, review count, and SNAP EBT eligibility.

**Evidence:** Step 1 confirms the agent navigated to the correct Target search URL with a price filter (https://www.target.com/s?searchTerm=frozen+vegetarian+cheese+pizza&facetedValue=pricetype%3Aprice%7C5%2C10). Step 4 (browser_analyze_state) provides direct evidence of 7 products extracted from the page, with the agent correctly filtering out the Red Baron at $3.99 (below $5) and a pepperoni pizza (not vegetarian). The 6 products in the final response exactly match the step 4 extraction results within the $5–$10 price range. The execution integrity status is "healthy" with no errors.

**Summary:** The agent navigated to Target.com with the appropriate search and price filter, extracted products from the page via browser_analyze_state (step 4 shows direct evidence), and correctly identified 6 frozen vegetarian cheese pizzas priced between $5–$10, properly excluding the $3.99 Red Baron and non-vegetarian pepperoni pizza.
